name: soupdraw

scripts.sign: npm run source && set -a && . ./.env && set +a && web-ext sign --channel=listed --approval-timeout=0 --amo-metadata=amo-metadata.json --upload-source-code=web-ext-artifacts/soupdraw-source-1.0.0.zip --api-key="$AMO_JWT_ISSUER" --api-secret="$AMO_JWT_SECRET"
scripts.sign:unlisted: npm run source && set -a && . ./.env && set +a && web-ext sign --channel=unlisted --upload-source-code=web-ext-artifacts/soupdraw-source-1.0.0.zip --api-key="$AMO_JWT_ISSUER" --api-secret="$AMO_JWT_SECRET"

author: Soup Up
description: SoupDraw: draw on your live camera feed with hand gestures (Firefox, on-device)
